news.t: OneAscent Launches Small Cap ETF, Bolstering its Suite of Values-Aligned, Index-Based Solutions

holdings.infoBox: OALC is an equity ETF with a total of 207 individual holdings. The top holdings are NVIDIA stock at 7.48%, Microsoft at 4.61%, Amazon.com at 3.76%, Alphabet at 3.37%, and Alphabet at 2.76%.

overview.description: The OneAscent Large Cap Core ETF (OALC) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 500 index. The fund is an actively-managed portfolio of US large-cap companies screened and selected for its value-based philosophy and fundamental evaluation. The fund seeks capital appreciation. OALC was launched on Nov 16, 2021 and is issued by Oneascent.

data.title: OneAscent Launches Small Cap ETF, Bolstering its Suite of Values-Aligned, Index-Based Solutions
data.text: BIRMINGHAM, Ala. , June 13, 2024 /PRNewswire/ -- OneAscent Investment Solutions is proud to announce the latest addition to its suite of values-aligned investment offerings: the OneAscent Small Cap Co...
